criteria.name: Backend Engineering Depth & Seniority
criteria.description: Measures years of professional backend engineering experience and demonstrated progression to senior-level responsibilities.
criteria.score_10_means: 5+ years of backend engineering with clear evidence of owning critical systems, leading technical decisions, or mentoring junior engineers.

criteria.name: High-Throughput & Low-Latency System Experience
criteria.description: Measures hands-on experience building or optimizing systems handling >10k requests per second with latency constraints.
criteria.score_10_means: Demonstrable experience architecting or scaling production systems to handle high-frequency traffic with documented performance optimizations.

criteria.name: Financial Systems & Trading Domain Knowledge
criteria.description: Measures familiarity with financial systems, trading platforms, payment processing, or regulated financial environments.
criteria.score_10_means: Proven experience working on trading platforms, financial infrastructure, or payment systems in a production fintech/trading environment.

criteria.name: Real-Time Data & Async Architecture
criteria.description: Measures practical experience with WebSocket protocols, real-time data pipelines, event-driven systems, or message brokers.
criteria.score_10_means: Strong production experience with WebSocket implementations and event-driven architectures (Kafka, RabbitMQ, or equivalent).

criteria.name: Python or Go Proficiency
criteria.description: Measures demonstrated strong proficiency in Python or Go as a primary backend language.
criteria.score_10_means: Multiple substantial production systems built and maintained in Python or Go, with evidence of deep language expertise.

criteria.name: Data Persistence & Containerization Stack
criteria.description: Measures hands-on experience with PostgreSQL, NoSQL databases, Docker, and Kubernetes in production environments.
criteria.score_10_means: Demonstrable production experience optimizing PostgreSQL, managing at least one NoSQL database, and deploying containerized systems at scale.
